display.purpose: Page titles, empty-state headlines, the landing card.

headline.purpose: Section headers and the claim text worth reading slowly.

body.purpose: UI prose, descriptions, help text. Measure 65-75ch.

mono.purpose: Machine artifacts only: IDs, timestamps, addresses.

shadows.name: overlay
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, action sheets, mobile detail sheet.

motion.name: ease-keeper
motion.purpose: Default ease-out for state transitions and lifts.

motion.name: duration-base
motion.purpose: Card lift, sheet open, optimistic pin fill.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single loud control on a screen: Open vault, Save changes.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #FBFAF8; background: #C16240; border: none; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 20px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A54B2E; transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(43,40,36,0.10); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C16240; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-btn-primary { transition: background 120ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #2B2824; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #E7E3DF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C16240; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Type Badge
components.description: Memory type pill. Label text is mandatory; color reinforces, never stands alone.
components.css: .ds-type-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.2; color: #3F5B7A; background: #E6EDF6; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 5px 12px; }

components.name: Filter Chip (selected)
components.description: An active filter in the vault filter bar.
components.css: .ds-chip-selected { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #A54B2E; background: #F7E7DD; border: 1px solid #C16240; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 5px 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-chip-selected:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C16240; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Vault search field with a leading magnifier.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #E7E3DF; border-radius: 12px; padding: 10px 14px; transition: border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), box-shadow 120ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: #C16240; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(193,98,64,0.35); } .ds-search input { border: none; outline: none; background: transparent; font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; color: #2B2824; width: 100%; } .ds-search input::placeholder { color: #685E57; }

components.name: Claim Card
components.description: Signature component. A single memory rendered to read and groom: serif memory text, type pill, quiet metadata, in-place pin.
components.html:
Prefers morning meetings and protects deep-work afternoons.

preferencefrom your agent · work · 3 days ago
components.css: .ds-claim { position: relative; background: #FFFFFF; border-radius: 16px; padding: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(43,40,36,0.04), 0 2px 8px rgba(43,40,36,0.06); transition: box-shadow 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1), transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.165,0.84,0.44,1); } .ds-claim:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(43,40,36,0.10); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-claim-text { font-family: Fraunces, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.35; color: #2B2824; margin: 0 0 12px; padding-right: 28px; text-wrap: pretty; } .ds-claim-meta { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; flex-wrap: wrap; } .ds-type-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #3F5B7A; background: #E6EDF6; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 5px 12px; } .ds-claim-sub { font-family: Figtree, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; color: #685E57; } .ds-claim-pin { position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px; background: none; border: none; padding: 4px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-claim-pin:hover { background: #F7E7DD; } .ds-claim-pin:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C16240; outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-claim:hover { transform: none; } }

narrative.overview: The vault is a calm, trusted archivist of your life. Not a database you administer, a collection you visit. Warmth comes from a clay accent, a humanist serif for the things worth reading slowly, generous rounding, and gentle warm-toned shadow, never from decoration. The real promise is trust, conveyed by clarity and honesty, not lock icons or scare-copy. It rejects the SaaS dashboard, the crypto wallet, and the raw developer tool.
keyCharacteristics: Warm minimalism: restraint with a pulse, never sterility.
One clay accent carries the warmth; the surface stays a true warm-white, never cream.
Fraunces serif for memory text; Figtree sans for UI; JetBrains Mono for machine artifacts only.
Soft and tactile: gentle warm shadows, rounded corners, pill chips.
Phone-first and glanceable; fast on a 10,000-item vault.

rules.name: The One Clay Rule
rules.body: Clay appears on <=10% of any screen: primary action, active state, pinned. If two clay things compete in one viewport, one is wrong.

rules.name: The No-Cream Rule
rules.body: The background is warm-white (#FBFAF8), never the cream/sand/parchment band. Warmth is carried by the clay accent and the serif, not a beige field.

rules.name: The Serif-for-Memory Rule
rules.body: The user's actual memory text is set in Fraunces; UI chrome is Figtree. What is worth reading slowly looks different from the controls.

rules.name: The Mono-Stays-Backstage Rule
rules.body: Monospace is for machine artifacts only. A human-written sentence in JetBrains Mono means the UI has tipped into developer-tool. Forbidden.

rules.name: The Warm-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow is tinted toward ink-warm rgba(43,40,36,...), never pure black. A gray lift on this warm field reads cold and cheap.

dos: Do keep the background Warm White (#FBFAF8); carry warmth through Clay and Fraunces, not a tinted field.
Do set the user's memory text in Fraunces and UI chrome in Figtree.
Do keep Clay to <=10% of any screen: primary action, active state, pinned.
Do tint every shadow toward warm ink, never pure black.
Do always show the type label text on badges; color reinforces, never stands alone.
Do write privacy and curation copy in plain second person.
Do keep delete calm and reversible in tone (30-day recovery), not a red alarm.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS dashboard: no identical card grids, no hero-metric tiles, no Linear/Vercel chrome.
Don't let it read as a crypto wallet: no neon-on-dark, no decorative gradients, no glassmorphism, no chain/wallet/gas language.
Don't slump into a raw developer tool: no JSON dumps, no terminal aesthetic, no monospace for human content, no unstyled tables.
Don't clone agentmemory.dev's look; reference its IA if useful, never its visuals.
Don't use a cream/sand/beige body background, gradient text, side-stripe border-left accents, or glass cards.
Don't put two competing Clay elements in one viewport.
